subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The Lord of Destiny hath come for the life of the world, yet the peoples remain wrapt in thick veils. Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر قد اتی مالک القدر لحیوه العالم ولکن الامم فی حجاب غلیظ قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment
